framework.name: Pre-Authorization Spending Control Blocking
framework.description: Spending controls execute before real-time authorization webhooks, declining transactions at the protocol level before issuing_authorization.request events are sent. This creates a defense-in-depth model where rule violations never reach the authorization logic.
framework.raw_quote: Spending controls run before real-time authorizations and can decline a purchase before the issuing_authorization.request is sent, resulting in a declined issuing_authorization.created event.
